two_bubbles_code v1.0.1
========================

This directory vendors third-party reference code for regression tests only.

Source
------

- Title: Two-bubble simulation and gravitational wave spectrum codes and data
- Authors: Satumaaria Sukuvaara, David Weir, Oliver Gould
- Source record: https://zenodo.org/records/14446671
- DOI: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.14446671
- File: two_bubbles_code-v1.0.1.zip
- Version: 1.0.1
- Published: 2024-12-13
- MD5: f6a8f271c6c72298519443d3906bc7bb
- License: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International

Local Layout
------------

- upstream/two_bubbles_code-v1.0.1/ contains the unmodified extracted archive.

Keep this code isolated from src/gw_fopt; tests may import or execute it as a
reference implementation, but it is not part of the public gw_fopt package.
